title: La memoria del cine: una película sobre Fernando Méndez-Leite
original_title: La memoria del cine: una película sobre Fernando Méndez-Leite
overview: A look at the life and work of Spanish filmmaker and film critic Fernando Méndez-Leite, as he writes his memoirs and a novel with autobiographical resonances.
